sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: dash
special_mechanics.description: Characters can dash back and forth by pressing L and R buttons respectively

special_mechanics.name: ki_charge_and_blast
special_mechanics.description: Players can charge their Ki gauge by holding Y and B buttons to unleash a Ki blast attack and counterattack it

special_mechanics.name: special_moves
special_mechanics.description: Special moves and meteor combos executed via button combinations on six-button control scheme

tier_notes: Tier 3 data: Qualitative information only. This is a fighting game with documented special moves and controls but no movement physics specifications.
